testcase.name: shouldReturnFormWithErrorIfBindingFails
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (fullname,password,role,username,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into rating (fitch_rating,moodys_rating,order_number,sandprating,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) 2026-04-10T17:07:29.627+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Created HttpSession as SecurityContext is non-default 2026-04-10T17:07:29.627+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Stored SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] to HttpSession [org.springframework.mock.web.MockHttpSession@4747ce29] 2026-04-10T17:07:29.627+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /rating/validate 2026-04-10T17:07:29.628+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Retrieved SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] 2026-04-10T17:07:29.628+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured POST /rating/validate

testcase.name: shouldRedirectToListIfExceptionThrown
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (fullname,password,role,username,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into rating (fitch_rating,moodys_rating,order_number,sandprating,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) 2026-04-10T17:07:29.639+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Created HttpSession as SecurityContext is non-default 2026-04-10T17:07:29.639+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Stored SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] to HttpSession [org.springframework.mock.web.MockHttpSession@58151738] 2026-04-10T17:07:29.639+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /rating/update/5 2026-04-10T17:07:29.639+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Retrieved SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] 2026-04-10T17:07:29.639+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured GET /rating/update/5 Hibernate: select r1_0.id,r1_0.fitch_rating,r1_0.moodys_rating,r1_0.order_number,r1_0.sandprating from rating r1_0 where r1_0.id=? 2026-04-10T17:07:29.641+02:00 WARN 137839 --- [ main] com.nnk.controllers.RatingController : Impossible de charger rating id=5 - Id not found
